title: [BUG] .NET IO interop and more
author: Freymaurer
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Hello! We noticed quite some issues with exceljs and because of a multitude of open Pull Requests and issues we thought we just fork it and fix these issues ourselves. This is the fork in question: [fork](https://github.com/nfdi4plants/exceljs).

As this repo is seeing some activity again, we wanted to file an issue with our changes. Sadly we did not document exact cases in the first bug fixes, but they occured reading files with exceljs that were written with [OpenXML](https://github.com/dotnet/Open-XML-SDK).

I updated the [README.md](https://github.com/nfdi4plants/exceljs#changes-since-fork) on our fork to reflect our fixes with the specific commit and a short description. In addition i will explain future issues more in-depth on this README.md

Lib version: 4.3.0

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

The forked branch contains the fixes we implemented to make it work. Possibly not the best solutions but any input would be welcome!

Feel free to tag me here if you want to solve these issues on the main repo. I will gladly provide anything required.
